description: CAPABILITY fixture: the correct slugify output depends on an arbitrary, unguessable project convention (spaces -> '__', not '-'). The base model defaults to '-' and FAILS the held-out oracle; only if the seeded slug-convention learning is retrieved does it use '__' and PASS. This is the vehicle for the Phase-4 capability A/B (seeded vs unseeded) — the trivial-sum-bug fixture cannot show capability because the base model solves it without any learning.
